messages.author: jc1
messages.text: We've been building out the meshcore footprint around the Augusta area over the past few months. Just creating a landing zone for any looking for more info.
messages.content_html: We've been building out the meshcore footprint around the Augusta area over the past few months. Just creating a landing zone for any looking for more info.

messages.text: Know who's running the room server in Waynesboro

messages.author: jc1
messages.text: No, have seen on the map, but no real life contact. I do know several folks (non mesh related) and hope to get merged down there at some point. You down that way?

messages.author: sQu1b
messages.text: Keep them up and running. I hope the Atlanta area gets more MC as people see what it can do. I'm in Gwinnett with a 75 ft mast and linking up with folks in TN - hopefully we get the gap bridged to y'all soon. (edited)

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
